name: PayArk API
description: PayArk is a payment API platform for Nepal that provides a unified interface for multiple payment providers including eSewa, Khalti, and HamroPay. The API enables merchants to create checkout sessions, manage payments, and receive webhook notifications with API key-based authentication and automatic retry logic.
